formulas.label: fd19
formulas.latex: c_{m , n} = \gamma_{1} \cdot \left(s_{m} - s_{n}\right)^{2} + \gamma_{2} \cdot \left(t_{m} - t_{n}\right)^{2} + \gamma_{3} \cdot \left(r_{p_{m}}^{s_{m}} - r_{p_{n}}^{s_{n}}\right)^{2} . \forall m , n \in \left[N\right] : m \neq n .

formulas.latex: f \left(b_{n}^{o}\right) = \lambda_{0} \left(1 + \mu_{1} \left\|b_{n}^{o}\right\|_{1}\right) L \left(\theta_{n}\right) + \lambda_{1} \underset{s \in U \backslash \left\{n\right\}}{\sum} \left\|\theta_{s} - \sum_{j = 1}^{i - 1} B_{\pi \left(j\right) s} \theta_{\pi \left(j\right)} - B_{n s} \theta_{n}\right\|_{2}^{2} + \lambda_{2} \underset{j \in \left[N\right]}{\sum} \left(x_{n j}^{R} - y_{n j}\right)^{2} + \lambda_{3} \underset{j \in \left[N\right]}{\sum} \left(x_{n j}^{L} - y_{n j}\right)^{2} + \lambda_{4} \underset{j \in \left[N\right]}{\sum} \left(x_{i_{j}}^{S} - y_{i_{j}}\right)^{2} .
